This video is going to go over how you become a Prestige Labs affiliate. So first you're going to go to affiliate.prestigelabs.com. You're going to click on this Join Our Team button. From here you're going to scroll down and hit Apply Today. Then you're going to input all of these fields that are required. You're going to want to put your email address in as your username and then everything else through this application. Once you're finished you're going to hit Submit. And then one of our Prestige Labs affiliate representatives will approve you on the back end within 24 hours. Once you're approved you will receive an email that looks like this. It is your welcome congratulations email. You will click on this link and you will use the username and the auto-generated password that was created here. When you click on this it will bring you to the login page. You will input the username and password that was created for you in that email. You're going to hit Log In and the very first thing it's going to do is bring me to this. Then you want to make sure that you save a copy of your document. You're going to want to make sure that you download it. Then from there you're going to want to upload this file. Click Upload. And then it will say Agreement updated successfully and it will log you in to your affiliate account.
